title: Battlecraft: A Cobblemon SMP
description: A Cobblemon based modpack used by the Battlecraft SMP.
body:
# Battlecraft SMP Modpack

### Cobblemon & Create
Dive into the ultimate Battlecraft SMP experience with our custom modpack! Featuring the Cobblemon Mod, you can catch and train your favorite pocket critters, bringing a whole new dimension of adventure to your Minecraft world. 

But that's not all—enhance your world with the powerful Create mod and a wide array of Create addons, perfect for all your auto-farming and engineering needs.

### Builders
For the builders at heart, we've included a selection of exceptional mods such as Chipped, Handcrafted, and Macaw's Windows, offering endless possibilities for creative construction. 

### Updated Dimensions
Explore the revamped Nether and End with the Incendium (Biomes Only) and Better End mods, transforming these dimensions into rich, immersive landscapes filled with new biomes and adventures. Discover even more with William Wythers' Expanded Overworld, adding diverse and unique biomes to the Overworld. 

Play along with us on the Battlecraft SMP and experience the world through the eyes of an unstoppable Gym Leader.
